## Why

What problem does it solve? Link issues if any.

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass
- [ ] Code and comments in English; UI strings added to `L10n` in both languages
- [ ] Conventional Commits, no attribution trailers
- [ ] [SPECS.md](../SPECS.md) updated if the portal protocol changed
- [ ] Verified on a real ETECSA network (say which: WiFi / Hogar) — *optional but golden*
